text: Walking through this space, I find myself struck by the sterile calm of glass walls and empty chairs—an environment that seems both open and closed, inviting reflection. Arriving at the R+D display, the bold graphics and illuminated text envelop me with a sense of creative possibility. There’s a quiet energy here, an invitation to question how humanity evolves through research and collaboration. I feel both curious and contemplative, aware that I am part of a larger inquiry into existence and innovation.
